creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 258605
net-p2p/{hostd,renterd,walletd}.patch: Work in Progress

I used the port tools (portclippy,portfmt,portlint) on the patch you provided, it's still work in progress, though. I noticed that walletd and hostd rc.d scripts starts but doesn't stop. I guess we need to debug the programs to configure the rc.d scripts properly. renterd rc.d script seems to start/stop fine. Thanks.
